title: No Wasted Time
description: Datapack that stops time on a multiplayer server when nobody is online
body:
No Wasted Time is a datapack that stops time on a multiplayer server when nobody is online

This prevents the `days` counter in F3 from continuously counting up when nobody is online, and keeps the sun in the same position from when the last player disconnected. Joining is no longer a dice roll of if its midnight!

# Removal

Before removing the datapack, run `/function dbx.nowastedtime:uninstall` before deleting the file from your server.

# Warning

If you have intentionally disabled the gamerule doDaylightCycle, do not use this datapack!
